name: Tri-County Bus Inc
registry_source: PA Department of State (not retrievable via web search); SAFER record inactive — no detail available
notes: USDOT 292426 with MC 188165 listed as TRI COUNTY BUS INC per fenderr; SAFER record for 292426 is INACTIVE (no details displayed). Input address 9013 Marshall Rd, Cranberry Township, PA 16066 is listed on Yelp as 'Tri County Management' (restaurant-like listing), suggesting the bus operation may be defunct, relocated, or misclassified. A separate but similarly named CRANBERRY BUS COMPANY INC (USDOT 1748558, 242 S Main St, Seneca PA 16346, 74 power units, 70 drivers, active) exists — NOT the same entity. Tri County Transportation Inc (Northern Cambria, USDOT 516013) is a third distinct, much larger PA operator.

name: Better Bus Svc
registry_source: Florida Sunbiz (not directly accessible via WebFetch — 403)
notes: No confident SAFER match. SAFER keyword search for 'BETTER BUS' and 'BETTER BUS SERVICE' returned zero records. Address 15866 SW 284th St, Homestead, FL 33033 falls in a residential area near MDC Homestead Campus/South Dade Skill Center. Likely a small or informal Miami-Dade County private school bus operator that may not be FMCSA-registered (intrastate-only school bus carriers in FL aren't necessarily required to hold USDOT). Sunbiz lookup was not retrievable via WebFetch (403). The Miami-Dade County Better Bus Network is a public transit brand — distinct from this private carrier.
